title: ChalkPlus
description: Adds colored chalk tools that place regular, glowing, and waxed chalk marks.
body:
[![Fabric](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/raw/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://fabricmc.net/)

![All types of chalk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sbDK4QJ3/images/581b10518f89799363ba507a4bb22bd5a8469c16.png)

# ChalkPlus

Have you ever found yourself hopelessly lost in a massive cave system? Or perhaps you wanted to leave a quick, immersive message for your friends on a multiplayer server? ChalkPlus is a simple yet highly effective mod that brings fully functional, drawable chalk into your Minecraft world!

### Key Features
Draw Anywhere: Leave visible marks, arrows, and symbols on almost any block surface. Perfect for marking dead ends or pointing towards the exit!

Multiple Colors: Combine basic chalk with any of the vanilla dyes to create a full palette of colorful markers.

Immersive Navigation: Say goodbye to placing ugly dirt blocks or wasting torches just to find your way back home. Chalk marks feel natural and fit perfectly into the game's aesthetic.

Multiplayer Friendly: Leave warnings about traps, mark your territory, or just draw something fun for other players to find.

Easy to Clean: Made a mistake? Chalk marks can be easily removed without damaging the block underneath.

### How to Use
Simply craft a piece of chalk, hold it in your hand, and right-click on a block to leave a mark. It is intuitive, lightweight, and designed to seamlessly enhance your vanilla survival experience.
